scope: Focused numeric appid branch summary for the two Tencent Video main interfaces in the anonymous direct-call scope.
caution: This is a tested numeric slice, not a proof of the full appid space.
The new result narrows appid behavior from a two-way guess into a tested three-family black-box split.

notes: Using the current canonical appkey still stays on appkey error for the tested neighboring values.
Representative checks on appid=10001004 show the same branch when appkey is missing or explicitly wrong.

api1.current_best_reading: In the tested anonymous slice, API1 numeric appid behavior is at least three-way: appid=1 still rides the loose success bypass branch, far noncanonical numerics like 2/3/10/100/1000/99999/10001000 return appid no find, and a tested near-canonical band around 10001005 falls into a stricter appkey-gated family instead of appid no find.

notes: Using the current canonical appkey still stays on appkey error for the tested neighboring values.
Representative checks on appid=20001237 show the same branch when appkey is missing or explicitly wrong.

api2.current_best_reading: In the tested anonymous slice, API2 numeric appid behavior is also at least three-way: appid=1 still rides the loose success bypass branch, far noncanonical numerics like 2/3/10/100/1000/99999 return appid no find, and the tested near-canonical band around 20001238 falls into a stricter appkey-gated family instead of appid no find.
